name: Orange Mousse Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pint whipping cream, heated to the boiling point
1 pie crust, already baked (or graham-cracker crust)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, sprinkle the gelatin over the cold water and let stand one minute.
2. Add the hot cream and process at low speed until the gelatin is well dissolved, usually about two minutes.
3. Add the cream cheese, orange juice, sugar, and vanilla; continue to blend.
4. Chill until the mixture starts to thicken, then pour into the crust and chill until firm.
5. Garnish with fruit slices if desired.
